_publications._publicationTitle: Acceptance and commitment therapy in youth with neurofibromatosis type 1 (NF1) and chronic pain and their parents: A pilot study of feasibility and preliminary efficacy.

_contextSnippet: Sixty percent of patients reported using mindfulness at least weekly and 60% reported using defusion techniques at least weekly. Eighty percent of patients endorsed practicing willingness
details: 60% of patients reported using mindfulness and defusion techniques at least weekly; 80% practiced willingness weekly or more
